description: This file contains Python code implementing a lightweight template matching algorithm based on token Jaccard similarity. It includes functions for tokenizing text, computing similarity scores, and matching template sections with inventory sections based on their textual content.

methods.name: set[str] _tokenize(text: str)
methods.description: Tokenizes a given text into a set of lowercase alphanumeric tokens.

methods.name: float _jaccard(a: set[str], b: set[str])
methods.description: Calculates the Jaccard similarity between two sets of tokens.

methods.name: Dict[str,Any] compute_template_inventory_matches( *, template: List[Dict[str, Any]], inventory: List[Dict[str, Any]], top_k: int = 3 )
methods.description: Computes the best matching inventory sections for each template section using token-based Jaccard similarity.

ctags.name: compute_template_inventory_matches
ctags.signature: ( *, template: List[Dict[str, Any]], inventory: List[Dict[str, Any]], top_k: int = 3 )
